name: Watford Athletics Track
metaTitle: Woodside Stadium Watford | Info & Wind Speed
metaDescription: Check live wind speed and track information for Woodside Stadium in Watford.

trackInfo.heading: Opening Times
trackInfo.text: The track is the home of Watford Harriers AC. Public use is subject to club training times and school event bookings.

trackInfo.heading: Entry Price
trackInfo.text: Access is primarily via club membership. Contact Watford Harriers or the council for information on individual track hire.

trackInfo.heading: Track Details
trackInfo.text: A high-quality 8-lane 400m synthetic track with a full complement of field event facilities.

trackInfo.heading: Parking Details
trackInfo.text: A large car park is available at the Horseshoe Lane entrance, serving the wider Woodside Playing Fields complex.

trackInfo.heading: Website
trackInfo.text: Check the official Watford Harriers website or Watford Borough Council page for facility availability.
